title: After much reflection, I’m delighted to share some exciting personal news...
excerpt: After much reflection, I’m delighted to share some exciting personal news... I’m absolutely thrilled and deeply honoured to announce this... I couldn’t be more proud or grateful to finally reveal that... I’m a judge in this year’s BIMA 100.

title: After much reflection, I’ve made the tough decision to move on from my role at New Balance.
excerpt: After much reflection, I’ve made the tough decision to move on from my role at New Balance. This chapter has been one of the most meaningful in my career. I’m grateful for every mile, project, trailhead, and starting line, and for the people who made it all feel human.

title: After much reflection, today marked my final day at Cohesity.
excerpt: After much reflection, today marked my final day at Cohesity. This wasn't an easy decision: the past year challenged me in ways I hadn't anticipated, and I found myself questioning whether I was running from difficulty or seeking more alignment.

title: After much reflection, I’ve decided it’s time to turn the page and begin a new chapter. I’m officially retiring.
excerpt: After much reflection, I’ve decided it’s time to turn the page and begin a new chapter. I’m officially retiring. This decision has allowed me to reflect on my career journey. I started as a software developer and later moved into sales and leadership.

title: After much reflection, I’ve decided to step away from the workforce for a season to be fully present with my two young daughters.
excerpt: After much reflection, I’ve decided to step away from the workforce for a season to be fully present with my two young daughters. It wasn’t an easy choice — I value my career deeply — but this time feels important and fleeting.

title: I'm thrilled to announce that I've joined Slate full time as CTO.
excerpt: I'm thrilled to announce that I've joined Slate full time as CTO. I am so excited to be joining such a great team at a time of transformation in both the content creation space and the tech industry. We're actively hiring Frontend, Backend, AI and Video engineers.

title: I'm thrilled to announce my 10-year anniversary of obsessively saving LinkedIn posts to read later without ever going back to a single one.
excerpt: I'm thrilled to announce my 10-year anniversary of obsessively saving LinkedIn posts to read later without ever going back to a single one. This wouldn't have been possible without the incredible community of LinkedIn creators writing epic, save-worthy posts.

title: I'm thrilled to announce that I completed a 40-day journey of showing up here consistently.
excerpt: I'm thrilled to announce that I completed a 40-day journey of showing up here consistently. I set out to gain 6,000 followers in 40 days. I didn't even gain a thousand, and I'm at peace with that. One of my goals I crushed completely.

title: I'm thrilled to announce that I will have an announcement sometime soon.
excerpt: I'm thrilled to announce that I will have an announcement sometime soon. Please stay tuned for a future announcement once I have firmer timing on when I can make the announcement.

title: I'm thrilled to announce that I started a new role this week, leading the People function at Clay.
excerpt: I'm thrilled to announce that I started a new role this week, leading the People function at Clay. Clay caught my attention because it was living the future of work while the rest of us were blabbering about it.

title: Humbled to announce I’ve joined Topline Pro as VP of Sales.
excerpt: Humbled to announce I’ve joined Topline Pro as VP of Sales. The first thing I saw when I walked into the office was a sign on the wall that said: “No Bullsh*t.” I remember thinking in that moment, “I’m home.”

title: Humbled to announce I've joined an ENGAGEMENT POD!
excerpt: Humbled to announce I've joined an ENGAGEMENT POD! Now my posts getting 500+ likes, 200 comments saying "Great post!" from people who didn't read it. Just kidding… I didn’t join any pods.

title: I’m humbled to announce that over the last two months, I have been a mess.
excerpt: I’m humbled to announce that over the last two months, I have been a mess. No new role or fellowship. Not even a certification. I remained quietly, professionally functional, but a mess nonetheless.

title: I’m humbled to announce that I’ve officially been recognized by The International iGaming Recognition Institute.
excerpt: I’m humbled to announce that I’ve officially been recognized by The International iGaming Recognition Institute. After years of relentless hustle, networking, and saying “let me introduce you”… I have been awarded: “The ‘I Know a Guy’ Award for Getting into the Sold-Out Party.”

title: I’m super humbled to announce something here with my LinkedIn community.
excerpt: I’m super humbled to announce something here with my LinkedIn community. Over the years, I’ve helped thousands of people with their careers. Thousands of people land jobs. Thousands of lives change directions. A lot of people ask, “What’s the secret?”

title: nobody talks about the Claude power users.
excerpt: nobody talks about the Claude power users. Here's their entire playbook. How serious builders co-work with Claude. How to make Claude Code your Chief of Staff. The Code Reviewer that catches what humans miss.

title: Nobody talks about this business model…
excerpt: Nobody talks about this business model… Give away your product. Never enforce limits. Win anyway for 20+ years.

title: Nobody talks about the thousands of videos I posted before the first one ever went viral.
excerpt: Nobody talks about the thousands of videos I posted before the first one ever went viral. Nobody talks about the studio apartment where my wife and I were raising three kids while trying to build something bigger for our family.

title: Nobody talks about the role of luck in careers.
excerpt: Nobody talks about the role of luck in careers. I get it. It undermines the story we all want to believe, that good decisions lead to good results and bad decisions lead to bad ones.

title: Nobody talks about this part in the startup world.
excerpt: Nobody talks about this part in the startup world. Working with family, friends, and partners who were in your life before the company. It’s a blessing and a curse at the same time.

title: Stop scrolling, start creating.
excerpt: Stop scrolling. Start creating. Every minute you spend consuming could be a minute spent building. Your first 100 posts will suck. Your first product will flop. Your first launch will disappoint. And that's exactly why you need to start today.

title: So many of us can’t stop scrolling and most of us don’t understand why…
excerpt: So many of us can’t stop scrolling and most of us don’t understand why. I’m joined by two experts who break down exactly what short-form content is doing to our brains.

title: Stop scrolling. You’re wasting precious time and energy.
excerpt: Stop scrolling. You’re wasting precious time and energy. I used to spend hours every day scrolling the feed, hoping customers would raise their hands. Now I spend focused time creating content, posting, and engaging.

title: Hey. Stop scrolling for a second.
excerpt: Hey. Stop scrolling for a second. You've hit a checkpoint. No hashtags. No algorithm magic. You're seeing this because you need to hear it: You're doing well. Really well.

title: Stop scrolling for a second. Look at this tiny red dot.
excerpt: Stop scrolling for a second. Look at this tiny red dot. I had a moment of panic where I felt completely behind. Then I saw a visual about global AI adoption and wanted to put the scale into perspective.

title: I don't usually post about personal stuff, but I had to share this.
excerpt: I don't usually post about personal stuff, but I had to share this. I had an interesting chat with my 10-year-old son about what he wants to become, and his answers surprised me.

title: I don’t usually post about personal stuff on LinkedIn. But this matters.
excerpt: I don’t usually post about personal stuff on LinkedIn. But this matters. A close friend of ours has recently been diagnosed with breast cancer. My wife has decided to do a squat challenge to raise funds for the National Breast Cancer Foundation.

title: I don’t usually post on here at weekends. And I don’t usually post about personal stuff.
excerpt: I don’t usually post on here at weekends. And I don’t usually post about personal stuff. But sometimes the personal is the professional. This week, for the second time this year, my nephew became homeless.

title: I don't usually post about personal stuff here... but as a blogger dad, this made me super proud!
excerpt: I don't usually post about personal stuff here... but as a blogger dad, this made me super proud. My daughter had her very first blog written about her.

title: I don’t usually post about personal stuff, but I think this rare moment is worth noting.
excerpt: I don’t usually post about personal stuff, but I think this rare moment is worth noting when all 3 sons are Dr. O’Donnell. My mother helped raise three sons who all became doctors.

title: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you.
excerpt: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you: Don’t hang out with your ex-coworkers. And stop gossiping about your old company. Post-layoff community can sometimes turn into a trap.

title: So you’ve been laid off. Now what?
excerpt: So you’ve been laid off. Now what? If you’ve been in your career for a while, chances are you’ve been laid off at least once. It's always a surprise and it always sucks.

title: If you’ve been laid off and self-doubt is starting to creep in, here’s something to remember.
excerpt: If you’ve been laid off and self-doubt is starting to creep in, remember: your knowledge didn’t disappear, your skills didn’t evaporate, your abilities didn’t suddenly become worthless.

title: If you’ve been laid off recently, I need you to hear this: Being laid off does not change your value.
excerpt: If you’ve been laid off recently, I need you to hear this: Being laid off does not change your value. Your job is not your power. When I lost a job I loved, I didn’t just lose income, I lost my confidence.

title: If you’ve been laid off, the first thing you should do is update your resume.
excerpt: If you’ve been laid off, the first thing you should do is update your resume. At least that’s what most career advisors tell us, but that's not what makes you valuable. Don't do a work audit. Do a whole human audit.

title: Sharing this in case it helps someone eKYC today.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps someone eKYC today: I never had a conceptual framework to understand the subtle differences between document-based eKYC and non-document-based eKYC.

title: Sharing this in case it helps other agencies, publishers, or accounts teams.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps other agencies, publishers, or accounts teams. We were copied on an email chasing payment for link placements that we did not order. It included real billing details and looked legitimate at first glance.

title: Sharing this in case it helps anyone reading.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps anyone reading. Do you have a personal board of directors? If not you should. A small group of people whose opinions, expertise, and values matter to you is so valuable.

title: Sharing this in case it helps someone.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps someone. I tried batching my content, using hook templates, and a bit of AI to write faster. It worked for a bit and then my reach and engagement tanked.

title: Sharing this in case it helps someone.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps someone. Muffin had been vomiting stomach acid on and off for months and it was treated as a gastro issue. Later he developed severe breathing distress and we learned he had an underlying lung problem.

title: I am honored to announce that I have earned a Master's degree in Education and International Development with Distinction.
excerpt: I am honored to announce that I have earned a Master's degree in Education and International Development with Distinction at UCL. I applied for the UK government Chevening Scholarship three times and was accepted on the third try.

title: Incredibly grateful and honored to announce that I have been shortlisted for the Informa Spirit Award.
excerpt: Incredibly grateful and honored to announce that I have been shortlisted for the Informa Spirit Award at my divisional level for the third year in a row. This recognition means a lot because it reflects the culture and values that make Informa special.

title: I am humbled and honored to announce that I have been nominated for an Employee of the Year award.
excerpt: I am humbled and honored to announce that I have been nominated for an Employee of the Year award at Pelican Zero.

title: I am pleased and honored to announce that the President has selected me to be one of the three Members of the Council of Economic Advisers.
excerpt: I am pleased and honored to announce that the President has selected me to be one of the three Presidentially appointed Members of the Council of Economic Advisers. I look forward to continue serving the President and the American people.

title: I'm honored to announce that I have been chosen for a prestigious made up award I can pay to have published.
excerpt: I'm honored to announce that I have been chosen for a prestigious made up award I can pay to have published in a leading industry online magazine I've never heard of. This is the best thing ChatGPT has ever done for me.

title: Would someone be proud to share this piece of content?
excerpt: Would someone be proud to share this piece of content? It's a good heuristic for publishing content on the internet in general. If you're collaborating with experts and influencers, it's the threshold you need to hit to get distribution benefits.

title: Proud to share our partnership with Prudential Financial.
excerpt: Proud to share our partnership with Prudential Financial, a global financial services leader and premier investment manager. We’re honored to partner with a purpose-driven company that has helped people build financial security and peace of mind.

title: Proud to Share! I recently authored a case study titled Turnaround Digitalization with Enhanced Digital Tools.
excerpt: Proud to Share! I recently authored a case study titled "Turnaround Digitalization with Enhanced Digital Tools". This article explores how we applied advanced digital tools during a recent turnaround at Kuraray America and how digitalization can improve planning and execution.

title: Proud to share what we’ve been building – a new step for The People Space.
excerpt: Proud to share what we’ve been building – a new step for The People Space. Nine years is a long time to run anything on the internet. Since then we’ve lived through huge shifts in work, HR, and media.

title: Humble. Is it possible to be humble when you start your post with “I’m humbled to announce”?
excerpt: Humble. Is it possible to be humble when you start your post with “I’m humbled to announce”? No. You’re not humbled. You’re thrilled. You’re proud. You worked hard for it and you want people to know.
